summary: Elric, still hiding his true identity as the Blue Lion's daughter, has arrived in the capital to bring down Dean Verux. Meanwhile, Isabel and Elric have parted ways after discussing how to cure the Blue Lion's disease. In a separate plotline, Mephi is being treated by Hanabi in the hospital, where they discuss the recent events involving Dean Verux and the excavation rights. Sean Neresta, Elric's friend and executioner of his family, has arrived at the capital, unaware of the situation with Isabel.
key_moments: Elric arrives in the capital to bring down Dean Verux
Isabel and Elric part ways after discussing the Blue Lion's disease cure
Sean Neresta arrives in the capital, unaware of the situation
